text: Hi, I received my coffee mug today but the handle is completely shattered. I have attached a picture of the broken mug and the box it came in. I would like my money back.
expected_behavior: Easy win. Agent 1 classifies as 'damaged_item'. Agent 2 finds the refund rule. Agent 3 approves it because a photo is attached. Agent 4 drafts an approval.

text: My new headphones arrived broken. The left ear doesn't work at all. Please send me a new one immediately.
expected_behavior: Missing info case. Agent 1 notes it's a damaged item but missing a photo. Agent 3 decides to ask for more info. Agent 4 drafts an email asking Bob for a picture.

text: I checked my bank statement and you guys charged me $45 TWICE for the same order! This is ridiculous, fix it now!
expected_behavior: Escalation case. Agent 1 classifies as 'billing_issue'. Agent 2 fetches the double-charge policy. Agent 3 escalates to the Billing Team. Agent 4 writes an empathetic delay message.
